title: Delicate German Dates Poke
description: A peppery and light German dish featuring stoned dates, sashimi-cut, and low-carb-friendly ingredients, evoking nostalgic feelings with its traditional flavors.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and olive oil to make the dressing.
In a large bowl, combine smoked salmon, red onion, capricorn goat cheese, and chopped parsley.
Add the pitted dates to the bowl and gently toss to combine with the salmon mixture.
Drizzle the dressing over the date and salmon mixture, and toss to coat.
Season with freshly ground black pepper to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the mixture a gentle toss to redistribute the ingredients.
Serve the Delicate German Dates Poke chilled, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
